overall.description: A smooth drone-style flythrough of a geothermal national park area in a video game simulation, featuring bison grazing on mineral terraces, a geyser erupting in the background, and a winding river through a forested landscape. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with clear summer lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal mineral terrace with distant lodge buildings

agents.ego_description: smoothly flying forward over the mineral terrace toward the distant buildings and water

notable_agents.action: large bison walking across the white mineral crust
bison grazing on the mineral deposits

entered.detail: vast white and gray mineral crust covering the ground with geothermal staining
rustic stone and log buildings with dark roofs typical of national park architecture
clear blue-green water winding through the mineral terrace
dense evergreen forest covering the distant hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast geothermal mineral terrace with a white and gray crusty surface. Several bison graze and walk across the terrain while historic lodge buildings stand in the distant background. The camera moves smoothly forward over the terrace toward a winding river.

scene_state.functional_zone: active geyser basin with erupting thermal feature

events.description: geyser comes into view on the left and begins erupting steam and water
camera slows slightly and banks left to capture the geyser eruption

agents.ego_description: flying forward while turning left to observe the erupting geyser and follow the river curve

notable_agents.action: bison walking along the water's edge near the geyser

entered.detail: active geyser erupting a tall column of steam and water into the air

segments.scene_description: As the camera rounds a bend, an active geyser erupts into view on the left, shooting steam high into the air. The historic buildings fade into the distance as the camera focuses on the thermal feature and the bison walking along the river's edge. The river shifts from the right to the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: river corridor through mineral terrace with forest edge

events.description: geyser exits view behind as camera follows the river bend into the forested area

agents.ego_description: following the river curve as it winds through the terrace, moving away from the geyser basin

notable_agents.action: solitary bison grazing near the distant water's edge

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the geyser behind and follows the river as it curves through the mineral terrace. The forest becomes prominent on the right side, creating a corridor effect with the water on the left. A solitary bison grazes in the distance as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mineral terrace along dense forest boundary

agents.ego_description: flying forward along the forest edge over the open mineral terrace

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the open mineral terrace stretching ahead with the dense evergreen forest lining the right side. The river remains visible in the distance on the left as the camera continues its smooth forward movement through the pristine geothermal landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a geothermal mineral terrace that gradually transitions into a river corridor bordered by a dense forest. It begins by gliding over a white and gray crusty surface where bison graze with historic lodge buildings visible in the far distance. As the camera rounds a bend, the buildings fade away and an active geyser erupts on the left, shooting steam high into the air while the winding river shifts toward the center of the frame. The scene then follows the curve of the water as the landscape narrows into a corridor, with a thick evergreen forest emerging on the right and a solitary bison grazing in the distance. Finally, the view opens back up to a vast mineral terrace stretching forward, flanked by the dense forest on one side and the distant river on the other.
